code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> Idle: Application Start

    Idle --> Loading: User Action
    Loading --> Loaded: Data Received
    Loading --> Error: Request Failed

    Loaded --> Processing: Submit Form
    Processing --> Success: Validation Passed
    Processing --> ValidationError: Validation Failed

    ValidationError --> Loaded: Fix Errors

    Success --> Saving: Save to Database
    Saving --> Saved: Success
    Saving --> Error: Database Error

    Saved --> Idle: Return to Home
    Error --> Idle: Acknowledge Error

    state Loading {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> FetchingData
        FetchingData --> ParseResponse
        ParseResponse --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]
    }

    state Processing {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> ValidateInput
        ValidateInput --> CheckBusinessRules
        CheckBusinessRules --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
    }

    state Saving {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> PrepareData
        PrepareData --> ExecuteTransaction
        ExecuteTransaction --> CommitChanges
        CommitChanges --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
    }

    note right of Idle
        Initial state
        Waiting for user input
    end note

    note left of Error
        Display error message
        Log error details
        Allow retry
    end note
repo_description: Simple claude built docs reader server.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为医疗系统画一个状态图，核心场景是患者记录从LabAnalyzer采集到最终存入HIPAA Vault的完整流程。系统启动后应该有个Idle状态等待用户操作。
明白了，Idle是初始状态。那用户触发操作后进入Loading状态对吗？Loading里面需要细化LabAnalyzer的数据获取过程吗？
对，Loading要展开成子状态图：先FetchingData，然后ParseResponse，最后数据进入PatientRecords。另外Loading可能失败，要有个Error状态。
好的，Loading子状态已添加。数据加载成功后到Loaded状态，用户提交表单进入Processing。Processing也需要展开吧？
Processing里面分ValidateInput和CheckBusinessRules两步，验证通过就到Success，失败的话要有ValidationError状态让用户修正。Success之后是Saving状态。
Saving子状态我设计成PrepareData → ExecuteTransaction → CommitChanges，最终写回HIPAA Vault。Saving也可能遇到数据库错误，要连到Error状态吗？
对，Saving失败要回到Error。等等，ValidationError应该是回到Loaded让用户修正，不是到Error。还有Saved完成后要返回Idle，Error也要能Acknowledge后回Idle。
已修正ValidationError流向，添加了Idle和Error的注释说明。整个流程从Vault启动，经过LabAnalyzer采集、验证、最终保存回Vault，闭环完成了。
